question_text: Which of the following best describes wavelength?

options.label: A
options.text: The distance a wave travels in one second

options.label: B
options.text: The distance from one point on a wave to the next identical point

options.label: C
options.text: The maximum height of a wave from the centre line

options.label: D
options.text: The number of complete waves passing a point per second

explanation: Wavelength is the distance between two identical points on consecutive waves, such as from one peak to the next peak, or one trough to the next trough. Option A describes wave speed, option C describes amplitude, and option D describes frequency.
